name: Your Name
personal_story: Write your personal journey here — why you do headhunting, how you got started, what drives you.
mission_statement: What your platform/company does — who you connect, how you help.
brand_voice: Professional, polite, headhunter-to-candidate communication style. No corporate fluff. Direct, practical, focused on human value.
founder_logs: Your authentic observations and experiences — what you've seen in the job market, recruiting, or tech.
industry_takes: Your perspective on the current job market and hiring landscape.
recent_insights: Recent lessons, thoughts, or realizations from running your operation.

talent.focus: Career growth, AI matching, bypassing gatekeepers.

cta_phrases.linkedin: Stop being ghosted. Apply directly via our AI Agent here 👉
cta_phrases.twitter: Tired of black-hole job apps? Level up your career here 🚀
cta_phrases.facebook: Apply ngay để AI Agent giúp bạn kết nối trực tiếp với hiring manager! 💪

referrer.focus: Passive income, decentralized headhunting, network value.

cta_phrases.linkedin: Grab your unique link, share it with your network, and earn the referral fee. DM for details 👉
cta_phrases.twitter: Your network is an asset. Copy the link, share it, and get paid when they land the job. 💸
cta_phrases.facebook: Copy link và share cho network của bạn. Nhận thưởng referral minh bạch trên on-chain! 🚀
